word: H7106 - קָצַע - qâtsaʻ - kaw-tsah' - Cause to scrape

sections.paragraph:
Original: קצע

Transliteration: qâtsa‛

Phonetic: kaw-tsah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to scrape, scrape off, cut off
    1. (Hiphil) to scrape
  2. to be cornered, be set in corners
    1. (Hophal) to cut off places, make corners

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2056,2057

Part(s) of speech: Verb
